sys_id.description: Unique identifier for the change request.

short_description.description: A brief summary of the change.

description.description: A detailed description of the change and its purpose.

type.description: The change type: normal, standard, or emergency.

state.description: The current state of the change request in its lifecycle.

priority.description: The priority level of the change request.

risk.description: The risk level assessed for this change.

impact.description: The impact level of this change.

assigned_to.description: The sys_id of the user assigned to implement the change.

assignment_group.description: The sys_id of the group responsible for the change.

requested_by.description: The sys_id of the user who requested the change.

start_date.description: The planned start date and time for the change.

end_date.description: The planned end date and time for the change.

cmdb_ci.description: The sys_id of the configuration item affected by this change.

close_code.description: The close code indicating how the change was resolved.

close_notes.description: Notes recorded when closing the change request.

sys_created_on.description: The date and time the change request was created.

sys_updated_on.description: The date and time the change request was last updated.
